title: Managed-device installed-software inventory summary
description: One record per managed device across an MDM (Jamf Pro managed Mac, Microsoft Intune managed device): the bounded list of installed software/applications on the device — application name, version, optional bundle/package identifier, and optional install date. This evidence answers the patch-/vulnerability-management and asset-inventory control question ('are managed endpoints running patched, authorized software?'), which is a DIFFERENT control question than endpoint.device_posture.v1; it is therefore a SEPARATE evidence kind, not an extension of the posture summary. Slice 490 deliberately EXCLUDED installed-software inventory from the posture summary as an over-collection guard; slice 555 adds it as this scoped sibling kind. Pulled read-only from the MDM API (Jamf computers-inventory APPLICATIONS section only; Intune managedDevices/{id}/detectedApps). The per-app field set is bounded to name + version + optional identifier + optional install date ONLY — NEVER file paths, per-user app-usage telemetry, license keys, device contents, browsing data, or owner personal contact detail. The connector reports a descriptive inventory; the platform evaluator owns the final pass/fail per (control, scope). Shared across the Jamf + Intune connectors because the two MDMs' installed-software field set is identical at the inventory-summary altitude; the source_mdm field preserves provenance.

source_mdm.description: MDM the record was collected from.

device_id.description: MDM-native stable identifier of the managed device (opaque, non-secret). Joins to the device's endpoint.device_posture.v1 record.

software_count.description: Number of installed-software items emitted for this device (length of the software array, after the per-device bound is applied).

software.description: Bounded list of installed software/applications on the device. Per-item fields are limited to name + version + optional identifier + optional install date.

version.description: Optional installed version string (e.g. '125.0.6422.142'). The load-bearing field for known-vulnerable-version detection.

identifier.description: Optional bundle id (macOS, e.g. 'com.google.Chrome') or package id (Windows). Stable cross-device identifier. NEVER a file path.

install_date.description: Optional install/first-seen date the MDM reports (RFC3339 or the source's own date form). Descriptive.
